class.name: AudioStreamInteractive
class.brief_description: Stores multiple sub-[AudioStream]s, which can be set to play interactively, with different settings for transitions.
class.description: [AudioStreamInteractive] can hold multiple sub-streams which are called [b]clips[/b]. Each clip can transition to another automatically with [method set_clip_auto_advance] and [method set_clip_auto_advance_next_clip], or manually with [method AudioStreamPlaybackInteractive.switch_to_clip] (the playback can be obtained with [AudioStreamPlayer.get_stream_playback]). Transitions can be edited via the Transition Editor, which can be opened in the inspector, by opening the stream's properties from an audio stream player and clicking [b]Edit Transitions[/b], or via code, using [method add_transition].

method.name: add_transition
method.description: Adds a transition between two or more clips. Provide the indices of the source and destination clips ([param from_clip] and [param to_clip] respectively), or use the [constant CLIP_ANY] constant to indicate that the transition happens from any clip [param to_clip] or [param from_clip] to any clip. * [param from_time] indicates the moment in [param from_clip] that the transition will begin after triggered. See [enum TransitionFromTime]. * [param to_time] indicates the time in [to_clip] that the playback will start from. See [enum TransitionToTime]. * [param fade_mode] indicates how the fade will happen between clips. If unsure, just use [constant FADE_AUTOMATIC] which uses the most common type of fade depending on [param to_time]. See [enum FadeMode]. * [param fade_beats] indicates how many beats the fade will take. Using decimals is allowed. Transition will be tempo-synced if [param from_clip] is imported with accurate tempo (see [ResourceImporterMP3] and [ResourceImporterOggVorbis]). Otherwise, this parameter works as transition speed. * [param use_filler_clip] indicates that there will be a filler clip used between [param from_clip] and [param to_clip]. * [param filler_clip] the index of the filler clip. * If [param hold_previous] is used, then [from_clip] will be remembered. This can be used together with [constant AUTO_ADVANCE_RETURN_TO_HOLD] to return to [from_clip] after another clip is done playing.

method.name: erase_transition
method.description: Erases a transition by providing [param from_clip] and [param to_clip] clip indices. [constant CLIP_ANY] can be used for either argument or both.

method.name: get_clip_auto_advance
method.description: Returns which auto-advance mode [param clip_index] has. See [method set_clip_auto_advance] and [enum AutoAdvanceMode].

method.name: get_clip_auto_advance_next_clip
method.description: Returns the clip index which the clip referenced by [param clip_index] will auto-advance to.

method.name: get_transition_fade_beats
method.description: Returns how many beats a transition will take between clips. See [method add_transition].

method.name: get_transition_fade_mode
method.description: Returns the fade type for a transition. See [method add_transition] and [enum FadeMode].

method.name: get_transition_filler_clip
method.description: Returns the index of the filler clip used for a transition. Returns [code]0[/code] if no filler clip is used. See [method add_transition] and [method is_transition_using_filler_clip].

method.name: get_transition_from_time
method.description: Returns when a transition will happen after [AudioStreamPlaybackInteractive.switch_to_clip] is called. See [method add_transition] and [enum TransitionFromTime].

method.name: get_transition_list
method.description: Returns the list of transitions. Each pair represents a source and a destination clip. Every even index (starting at 0) represents the index of a source clip, while every odd index represents the index of a destination clip. Filler clips are not included.

method.name: get_transition_to_time
method.description: Returns which time position the destination clip starts at, after the transition. See [method add_transition] and [enum TransitionToTime].

method.name: has_transition
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if a given transition exists.

method.name: is_transition_holding_previous
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the source clip in a transition uses the [i]hold previous[/i] functionality. See [method add_transition].

method.name: is_transition_using_filler_clip
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if a transition uses the [i]filler clip[/i] functionality. See [method add_transition].

method.name: set_clip_auto_advance
method.description: Sets an auto-advance mode to a clip, referred by index. See [enum AutoAdvanceMode].

method.name: set_clip_auto_advance_next_clip
method.description: Sets the index of the clip which [param clip_index] will auto-advance to when finished. If [param clip_index] has looping enabled, then auto-advance will be ignored.

method.name: set_clip_name
method.description: Sets the name of [param clip_index], for easier identification.

members.member: Number of clips contained in this audio stream.
Index of the initial clip, which will be played first when this audio stream is played.

constants.constant: Starts transition as soon as possible, does not wait for any specific time position.

Transitions when the clip playback position reaches the next beat. This only works if sub-stream is imported with BPM set. See [ResourceImporterOggVorbis] or [ResourceImporterMP3]. Falls back to [constant TRANSITION_FROM_TIME_IMMEDIATE] if there's no tempo.

Transitions when the clip playback position reaches the next bar. This only works if sub-stream is imported with BPM [i]and[/i] beats per bar information set. See [ResourceImporterOggVorbis] or [ResourceImporterMP3]. Falls back to [constant TRANSITION_FROM_TIME_IMMEDIATE] if there's no tempo or beats per bar information.
Transitions when the clip finishes playing. This only works if sub-stream has length higher than [code]0.0[/code]. Falls back to [constant TRANSITION_FROM_TIME_IMMEDIATE] otherwise.
Transitions to the same position in the destination clip. This is useful when both clips have exactly the same length and the music should fade between them.
Transitions to the start of the destination clip.
Does not use fade for the transition. This is preferred when transitioning from the end of a clip to the beginning of another, and each clip already has a fade.
Uses a fade-in in the destination clip, after the source clip ends without a fade-out at the transition time.
Uses a fade-out in the source clip, while the destination clip starts without a fade-in at the transition time.
Uses a cross-fade between clips. The source clip fades out while the destination clip fades in.
Uses [constant FADE_OUT] if [method get_transition_to_time] returns [constant TRANSITION_TO_TIME_START]. Uses [constant FADE_CROSS] otherwise. It is recommended to use this by default.
Disables auto-advance. The clip will not automatically switch to another. This is the default behavior.
Enables auto-advance. The clip will automatically switch to another, which must be specified.
Enables auto-advance, but instead of switching to a specified clip, the stream will return to hold. See [method add_transition].
This constant describes that any clip is valid for a specific transition as either source or destination.
